name: Get the Actual Gait. This is calculated by the actual movement of the character, and so it can be different from the desired gait or allowed gait. For instance, if the Allowed Gait becomes walking, the Actual gait will still be running untill the character decelerates to the walking speed.
title: Get the Actual Gait. This is calculated by the actual movement of the character, and so it can be different from the desired gait or allowed gait. For instance, if the Allowed Gait becomes walking, the Actual gait will still be running untill the character decelerates to the walking speed.

name: Calculate the Allowed Gait. This represents the maximum Gait the character is currently allowed to be in, and can be determined by the desired gait, the rotation mode, the stance, etc. For example, if you wanted to force the character into a walking state while indoors, this could be done here.
title: Calculate the Allowed Gait. This represents the maximum Gait the character is currently allowed to be in, and can be determined by the desired gait, the rotation mode, the stance, etc. For example, if you wanted to force the character into a walking state while indoors, this could be done here.

name: Map the character's current speed to the configured movement speeds with a range of 0-3, with 0 = stopped, 1 = the Walk Speed, 2 = the Run Speed, and 3 = the Sprint Speed. This allows you to vary the movement speeds but still use the mapped range in calculations for consistent results.
title: Map the character's current speed to the configured movement speeds with a range of 0-3, with 0 = stopped, 1 = the Walk Speed, 2 = the Run Speed, and 3 = the Sprint Speed. This allows you to vary the movement speeds but still use the mapped range in calculations for consistent results.
